info.english_meaning: to kill to destroy to hurt to injure to become powerful to take to dwell to stay
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAm pfTag rUpeRa nEva pAWyate  parantu tatra 10.47 piji~ ityatra 'tuja pijeti kecit laji luji ityeke' iti nirdeSena ayaM pAWaBedaH jYApitaH asti
